sectionSubtitle: Eight AI-powered creative tools that speak the language of music — from generative composition and MIDI hardware control to collaborative production and stem separation.

features.title: Generative Composition
features.description: HeadyCompose generates full melodic, harmonic, and rhythmic compositions from a text prompt, a reference mood, or a seed chord — all anchored to φ-Harmonic scale systems derived from the natural overtone series. Choose from Fibonacci-mode scales (Dorian-φ, Lydian-φ, Phrygian-φ) and let the AI extend, vary, and develop your musical ideas across any number of bars.

features.title: MIDI SysEx Integration
features.description: HeadyMIDI goes deeper than standard MIDI — it sends and receives SysEx (System Exclusive) messages for direct parameter control of hardware synthesizers, drum machines, and MIDI controllers. Map geometric patterns from Sacred Geometry algorithms to oscillator frequencies, filter cutoffs, reverb depths, and LFO rates on any SysEx-capable hardware device.

features.title: Ableton Sync
features.description: HeadySync bridges HeadyMusic to Ableton Live via Max for Live devices and the Ableton Link protocol. Send generated MIDI clips directly to Ableton tracks, sync HeadyCompose's tempo to your Ableton session clock, and control HeadyMusic parameters from Ableton's MIDI mapping system. Logic Pro (via MIDI FX), FL Studio (via VST wrapper), and Bitwig integrations are also available.

features.title: Phi-Harmonic Scales
features.description: HeadyMusic's scale library includes standard Western scales, world tuning systems, and a unique suite of φ-Harmonic scales where interval ratios are derived from the golden ratio (φ = 1.618…) and Fibonacci relationships rather than equal temperament. These scales produce intervals that appear naturally in acoustics, architecture, and biological systems — creating music that feels simultaneously familiar and transcendent.

features.title: Real-Time Collaboration
features.description: Invite collaborators to your HeadyMusic session for live co-composition. Multiple producers can contribute chord progressions, melodic lines, and drum patterns simultaneously in a shared MIDI canvas — with conflict-free CRDT merging, attribution tracking, and version history. Sync sessions via WebSocket with < 20ms latency for lag-free remote jamming.

features.title: Custom AI Instruments
features.description: Train a personal AI instrument on your own audio samples — drums, synths, vocals, field recordings — using HeadyMusic's Instrument Studio. The trained model learns your timbre's spectral fingerprint and can generate new variations, fill rhythmic gaps, or harmonize with existing material while preserving your sonic identity. Instruments export as VST3/AU plugins.

features.title: Stem Separation
features.description: HeadyStem separates any mixed audio file into individual stems — vocals, drums, bass, melodic instruments, and ambience — using a custom-trained source separation model optimized for φ-Harmonic frequency bands. Stems export at 48kHz/32-bit float. Re-pitch and time-stretch individual stems without artifacts using phase vocoder processing.

features.title: Creative Export
features.description: Export your HeadyMusic sessions in every format your workflow demands: MIDI (.mid), MusicXML for notation software (Sibelius, Dorico, MuseScore), Ableton Live Set (.als), Logic Pro Session (.logicx), audio renders (WAV, AIFF, FLAC, MP3), and stem bundles. Batch export all variations generated during a composition session with a single click.
